text.title: Cross-Platform Token Distribution Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: How many platforms consume these tokens?

conclusion.verdict: build Style Dictionary pipeline; emit per-platform bundles
skip pipeline; CSS variables direct suffice
apply design-tokens-fundamentals first; distribution depends on it

example.trace: web+iOS+Android product → 3 platforms → Style Dictionary pipeline configured

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
